title: 目標達成の後に・入り混じる黒白

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Copano Rickey is diligently training with
her friends, the topic of her being capable of
running on turf comes up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The classic year Triple Crown tour garners a great
deal of attention, making it the ideal event to
promote feng shui. Copano Rickey now has to
make a crucial decision between dirt or turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First, she'll enter the Fukuryu Stakes to assess her
aptitude. Following that, she'll revisit the idea of
taking on G1 turf races.
